name: Curtissimo.SplitPane
comment:
`Curtissimo.SplitPane` provides a nestable split pane for Elm.

    import Curtissimo.SplitPane as SplitPane exposing (SplitPane)
    import Html exposing (Html, text)

    type alias Model =
        { splitPane : SplitPane Msg }

    type Msg
        = SplitPaneMsg SplitPane.Msg
        | SplitPaneReady

    init : () -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    init _ =
        let
            ( splitPane, splitPaneCmd ) =
                SplitPane.init
                    SplitPane.VerticalOrientation
                    (SplitPane.Px 200)
                    SplitPane.After
                    "split-pane"
                    SplitPaneMsg
                    SplitPaneReady
        in
        ( { splitPane = splitPane }
        , splitPaneCmd
        )

    subscriptions : Model -> Sub Msg
    subscriptions model =
        SplitPane.subscriptions model.splitPane

    update : Msg -> Model -> ( Model, Cmd Msg )
    update msg model =
        case msg of
            SplitPaneMsg splitPaneMsg ->
                let
                    ( updated, updatedMsg ) =
                        model.splitPane
                            |> SplitPane.update splitPaneMsg
                in
                ( { splitPane = updated }
                , updatedMsg
                )

            SplitPaneReady ->
                ( model, Cmd.none )

    view : Model -> Browser.Document Msg
    view model =
        { title = "My Split Pane Page"
        , body =
            model.splitPane
                |> SplitPane.assignPanes
                |> SplitPane.setPrimaryPane
                    (text "Primary pane")
                |> SplitPane.setSecondaryPane
                    (text "Secondary pane")
                |> SplitPane.view
        }

**NOTE:** Don't forget to include the `subscriptions`!

## Opaque types

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The messages the split pane uses.

unions.name: Orientation
unions.comment: Orientations the split pane can have.

unions.name: Position
unions.comment: Indicator if the secondary pane is before or after the primary pane.

unions.name: SplitPane
unions.comment: The state of the split pane.

unions.name: SplitPaneRenderable
unions.comment: The bridge between states and rendering.

unions.name: Unit
unions.comment: The way to specify the measure of the secondary pane.

values.name: assignPanes
values.comment: Change `SplitPane` into `SplitPaneRenderable` to prepare it to render.

values.name: getSecondaryPaneMeasure
values.comment: Get the current measure of the secondary pane.

values.name: hasThickGutters
values.comment: Query the state to determine if the split pane uses thick gutters

values.name: init
values.type: Curtissimo.SplitPane.Orientation -> Curtissimo.SplitPane.Unit -> Curtissimo.SplitPane.Position -> String.String -> (Curtissimo.SplitPane.Msg -> msg) -> msg -> ( Curtissimo.SplitPane.SplitPane msg, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: isReady
values.comment: Query the state to determine if the split pane is ready to use.

values.name: isSecondaryPaneVisible
values.comment: Query the state to determine if the secondary pane is visible.

values.name: setPrimaryPane
values.comment: Set the content of the primary pane of the split pane.
values.type: Html.Html msg -> Curtissimo.SplitPane.SplitPaneRenderable msg -> Curtissimo.SplitPane.SplitPaneRenderable msg

values.name: setSecondaryPane
values.comment: Set the content of the secondary pane of the split pane.
values.type: Html.Html msg -> Curtissimo.SplitPane.SplitPaneRenderable msg -> Curtissimo.SplitPane.SplitPaneRenderable msg

values.name: setSecondaryPaneMeasure
values.comment:
Set the secondary pane to a specific measure based on how the split pane
was initialized. If the split pane was initialized as a percentage, then the
integer value is clamped to 0 and 100 inclusive.

values.name: setSecondaryPaneVisible
values.comment:
Set the visibility of the secondary pane.

When set to `False`, the secondary pane and the resize gutter are not visible.

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment:
The subscriptions used to monitor mouse movements when a split pane resize
is active, as well as window resizing.

values.name: update
values.comment: Update the state of the split pane.
values.type: Curtissimo.SplitPane.Msg -> Curtissimo.SplitPane.SplitPane msg -> ( Curtissimo.SplitPane.SplitPane msg, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: useThickGutters
values.comment:
Changes the layout of the resize gutter to be thin or thick based
on the flag provided.
